quality.description_completeness: High quality. Provides clear mechanical effect (charmed for 1 hour upon next encounter) and flavor text (rose-hued, heart-shaped bubble).
quality.formatting_notes: Uses standard markdown link formatting ('[charmed](#charmed)') which is acceptable for data ingestion/display.

mechanics.trigger_and_duration: Clear trigger ('next time you see a creature within 10 minutes after drinking') and duration ('1 hour').
mechanics.effect_specificity: The effect is conditioned by the drinker's preference ('If the creature is of a species and gender you are normally attracted to, you regard it as your true love'), adding mechanical nuance beyond standard 'charmed'.
